sections.title: Getting Started
sections.content:
# Getting Started with Matsya AI

Welcome to Matsya AI, your AI-powered fishing assistant! This guide will help you get started with the app.

## Quick Start

1. **Upload a Photo**: Take or select a photo of your catch
2. **Get Analysis**: Our AI analyzes species, weight, freshness, and quality
3. **View Insights**: Get market prices, sustainability info, and recommendations
4. **Track History**: All your catches are saved in the History tab

## Key Features

- **Fish Detection**: Identify species with high accuracy
- **Disease Detection**: Spot diseases early to protect your catch
- **Weight Estimation**: Get accurate weight estimates
- **Freshness Assessment**: Know the quality grade of your fish
- **Market Insights**: See current market prices
- **Ocean Data**: Access weather, tides, and fishing zones
- **AI Assistant**: Chat with our AI for fishing advice

sections.title: Upload & Analysis
sections.content:
# Upload & Analysis

## Single Image Upload

1. Tap the **Upload** tab
2. Choose **Camera** or **Gallery**
3. Take/select a clear photo of the fish
4. Wait for AI analysis (usually 5-10 seconds)
5. View detailed results

## Group Analysis

For multiple fish:

1. Tap **Group Upload**
2. Select 2-20 images
3. Get aggregate statistics
4. View individual results

## Best Practices

- Use good lighting
- Capture the entire fish
- Avoid blurry images
- Include a reference object for scale
- Take photos from the side view

sections.title: Map & Ocean Data
sections.content:
# Map & Ocean Data

## Weather Layers

View real-time weather data:

- **Temperature**: Sea surface temperature
- **Wind**: Wind speed and direction
- **Pressure**: Atmospheric pressure
- **Clouds**: Cloud coverage

## Disaster Alerts

- View active cyclone, tsunami, and storm warnings
- Check your safety status
- Get notifications for nearby alerts

## Fisherman Tools

- **Sunrise/Sunset**: Plan your fishing trips
- **Moon Phase**: Track lunar cycles
- **Tides**: High and low tide times
- **Best Fishing Times**: AI-recommended fishing windows

## Zone Insights

- View fishing recommendations by zone
- See recent catch activity
- Check target species and conditions

sections.title: AI Chat Assistant
sections.content:
# AI Chat Assistant

## How to Use

1. Open the **Chat** tab
2. Type your question or use voice input
3. Get instant AI-powered responses
4. Reference your catch analyses in conversations

## What You Can Ask

- Fishing techniques and tips
- Species identification help
- Disease treatment advice
- Market price trends
- Weather and ocean conditions
- Sustainability questions
- Equipment recommendations

## Features

- **Voice Input**: Speak your questions
- **Text-to-Speech**: Listen to responses
- **Conversation History**: Review past chats
- **Analysis References**: Link to your catches
- **Multilingual**: Chat in your language

sections.title: Analytics & Reports
sections.content:
# Analytics & Reports

## Dashboard Metrics

Track your fishing performance:

- **Total Earnings**: Revenue from catches
- **Total Catches**: Number of fish analyzed
- **Total Weight**: Combined weight of all catches
- **Top Species**: Your most caught species

## Charts & Trends

- **Weekly Earnings**: Track income over time
- **Species Breakdown**: Pie chart of species distribution
- **Quality Distribution**: Grade distribution of catches

## PDF Reports

Generate professional reports:

1. Open **Analytics** tab
2. Tap **Export PDF**
3. Share with buyers or cooperatives

Reports include:
- Summary statistics
- Species breakdown
- Weekly trends
- Catch history

sections.title: Settings & Profile
sections.content:
# Settings & Profile

## Profile Management

- Edit your name, phone, and location
- Upload profile avatar
- Set fishing port and region
- Configure public profile

## Preferences

- **Language**: Choose from 6 Indian languages
- **Units**: Select kg, lb, or grams
- **Notifications**: Manage alert preferences
- **Offline Sync**: Auto-sync when online

## Public Profile

- Enable public profile sharing
- Generate shareable link
- Show/hide statistics
- QR code for easy sharing

## Privacy & Security

- Change password
- Export your data (CSV)
- Delete account
- Manage data sync

sections.title: Tips & Tricks
sections.content:
# Tips & Tricks

## Photography Tips

- **Lighting**: Natural daylight works best
- **Background**: Use a plain, contrasting surface
- **Angle**: Side view captures most details
- **Distance**: Fill 70-80% of frame with fish
- **Focus**: Ensure the fish is sharp and clear

## Accuracy Tips

- Clean the fish before photographing
- Include a ruler or coin for scale
- Capture both sides if possible
- Avoid shadows on the fish
- Take multiple photos for group analysis

## Offline Mode

- Download maps for offline use
- Cache recent analyses
- Queue uploads when offline
- Auto-sync when connection restored

## Battery Saving

- Disable unused weather layers
- Reduce map refresh rate
- Use offline mode when possible
- Close unused conversations

sections.title: FAQ
sections.content:
# Frequently Asked Questions

## General

**Q: Is Matsya AI free to use?**
A: Yes, Matsya AI is completely free for fishermen.

**Q: Does it work offline?**
A: Partial offline support. Analysis requires internet, but you can view cached data offline.

**Q: Which languages are supported?**
A: English, Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, and Marathi.

## Analysis

**Q: How accurate is the species detection?**
A: Our AI achieves 95%+ accuracy on common Indian fish species.

**Q: Can I analyze multiple fish at once?**
A: Yes, use Group Upload to analyze 2-20 fish together.

**Q: Why is my analysis taking long?**
A: Slow internet or server load. Try again in a few moments.

## Privacy

**Q: Is my data secure?**
A: Yes, all data is encrypted and stored securely on AWS.

**Q: Can I delete my account?**
A: Yes, go to Settings > Privacy > Delete Account.

**Q: Who can see my catches?**
A: Only you, unless you enable public profile sharing.
